query: Russia annual GDP growth rate recent quarters 2025 and Q1 2026, what is the trajectory and latest official figures from Rosstat and Trading Economics
answer:
I've completed the research on Russia's GDP growth trajectory. Here's a summary of the key findings:

## Russia GDP Growth — Key Findings

**Clear decelerating trajectory into contraction:**

| Quarter | YoY GDP Growth |
|---|---|
| Q1 2025 | +1.4% |
| Q2 2025 | +1.1% |
| Q3 2025 | +0.6% (Rosstat confirmed) |
| Q4 2025 | +1.0% |
| **Q1 2026** | **−0.2%** (first contraction since Q1 2023) |

**Latest official figure (Q1 2026):** Russia's economy contracted 0.2% YoY — its first annual decline in three years — with manufacturing −1.5%, professional/scientific/technical activities −6.1%, and transportation −1.8%. Confirmed final estimate released May 15, 2026.

**Full-year 2025:** +1.0% (Rosstat confirmed), a sharp slowdown from a revised 4.9% in 2024.

**Q2 2026 (no official figure yet):** Monthly data show weakening momentum — April +1.3% YoY slowing to May +0.3% YoY. CBR describes growth as "moderate after a temporary decline at the beginning of the year."

**2026 forecasts:**
- **Bank of Russia:** 0.5%–1.5% (maintained June 2026)
- **Russian Ministry of Economic Development:** 0.4% (downgraded from 1.3% in May 2026)
- **IMF:** 1.1% (raised from 0.8% in April on higher oil prices)
- **World Bank:** 0.8%
- CBR cut its key rate to 14.25% on June 19, 2026 (from 15.5% earlier).

All data has been cross-validated across Trading Economics, Rosstat/Interfax, the Moscow Times, BOFIT, the Bank of Russia, IMF, and World Bank, and delivered via the structured output.

key_facts: Russia GDP contracted 0.2% YoY in Q1 2026 — first annual decline since Q1 2023 (final estimate confirmed May 15, 2026).
Q4 2025 GDP grew +1.0% YoY, up from Q3 2025's +0.6% (slowest since 2023).
Quarterly YoY 2025 sequence: Q1 +1.4%, Q2 +1.1%, Q3 +0.6%, Q4 +1.0%.
Full-year 2025 GDP grew +1.0% (Rosstat confirmed), sharply down from a revised 4.9% in 2024.
Q1 2026 sector contractions: manufacturing -1.5%, professional/scientific/technical -6.1%, transport/storage -1.8%.
Monthly GDP YoY slowed to +0.3% in May 2026 from +1.3% in April 2026.
Bank of Russia maintains 2026 GDP forecast at 0.5%-1.5% (June 2026).
Russian Ministry of Economic Development downgraded 2026 forecast to 0.4% (from 1.3%) in May 2026.
IMF raised 2026 Russia GDP forecast to 1.1% (April 2026) from 0.8% (January 2026) on higher oil prices.
World Bank retained 2026 Russia GDP forecast at 0.8%, lowered 2027 to 0.7%.
CBR cut key rate to 14.25% on June 19, 2026 (from 15.5% earlier in the year).
No official Q2 2026 GDP figure available as of early July 2026; CBR describes growth as 'moderate after a temporary decline at the beginning of the year.'
